F9 Rule 9.3(3)(aa) inserted (20.12.2012) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 4) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/2806) , rules 1 , 7(b)(i)


F10 Words in rule 9.3(3)(b) substituted (31.12.2020) by The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b)(i) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)

metadata.title: Part 9 — Applications for a Financial Remedy
